men_height.description: Heights of adult men in the population, normally distributed with given mean and standard deviation.

women_height.description: Heights of adult women in the population, normally distributed with given mean and standard deviation.

proportion_female.description: Proportion of adults that are female, used in the Bayes' theorem calculation.

height_threshold.description: Height threshold (182.9 cm / six feet) used to determine the proportion of adults taller than this value who are women.
